info.name: CDISC Library API (full)
info.description:
Every GET endpoint across CDISC's published OpenAPI specs.

`baseUrl` includes /api (default https://library.cdisc.org/api).
1. CDISC Library API (core)  - {{baseUrl}}/mdr/... (official 1.1.0 + flagged mirror extras), sub-foldered by tag.
2. COSMoS v1                 - {{baseUrl}}/cosmos/v1/mdr/...
3. COSMoS v2 Biomedical Concept     - {{baseUrl}}/cosmos/v2/mdr/...
4. COSMoS v2 Dataset Specialization - {{baseUrl}}/cosmos/v2/mdr/...

ENVIRONMENTS: import an environment and pick it (top-right in Postman).
  - Production: baseUrl=https://library.cdisc.org/api + your cdisc_api_key.
  - SwaggerHub mock: baseUrl=https://virtserver.swaggerhub.com/CDISC1/share-2.0/1.1.0 (returns example payloads, no key needed; covers the core folder only - the COSMoS folders are not mocked).

AUTH: set the `cdisc_api_key` variable (from the environment); sent as the `api-key` header on every request.
